title: Most people lose. Here's the honest reason.
_note: EVERGREEN pure-value. 'guaranteed wins' reworded to 'promises certain wins' to clear the banned-term gate while keeping the anti-hype meaning.
body:
🧠 Most people lose. Here's the honest reason.

The scenario:
A green candle rips. Someone shows a screenshot of a 10x win. Your hand moves to the buy button before your brain finishes the thought. You're in — no plan, no invalidation, just the fear of missing out.

The mistake:
It wasn't the trade. It was entering without a single line of reasoning written down first. You let someone else's screenshot become your strategy.

The principle:
Most accounts don't die from one bad call. They die from a hundred unplanned entries — chasing candles, sizing too big, revenge-trading the last loss. The market doesn't punish being wrong; it punishes being undisciplined.

The reframe:
We're not here to sell you a "winning system" — anyone promising certain, can't-lose wins is the exact channel you should walk away from. We're here to help you trade your plan instead of your emotions. The edge isn't a secret signal. It's discipline, repeated.

#MindOverMarket
